name: keroum-site
description: KeroUm — pitch site and interactive demo

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html
scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map scss/principal.scss principal.css && sass --no-source-map scss/principal.scss dist/principal.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
